title: Remove stale blockers tied to closed epic tskl-fzn
description: Audit dependencies on tskl-fzn and remove blocker links now that it is closed. Update affected epics and add note explaining change.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

custom.beads_close_reason: Removed stale tskl-fzn blockers from dependent epics and synced JSONL/DB.
custom.beads_notes:
Removed tskl-fzn blocker links from tskl-8ke, tskl-eyu, tskl-5er, and tskl-538 after confirming tskl-fzn is closed. Dependency graph now reflects current status.
Removed tskl-fzn dependency in JSONL and DB for tskl-8ke, tskl-eyu, and tskl-538 (tskl-5er already clear). Verified bd dep list shows no tskl-fzn blockers. Ran bd sync to align JSONL.
